label: Write your day-3 payment reminder email
use_case: Send a friendly reminder after customers haven't opened their first order confirmation email.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Subject: Your Order Confirmation Follow-Up - [Your Company Name]

Dear [Customer's First Name],

Thank you for choosing [Your Company Name]! It’s been a few days since we sent your order, and I hope everything is going well. If there are any issues or if you have questions, please let us know.

Best regards,
[Your Full Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]

label: Create a welcome series for new subscribers
use_case: Automate the first three emails sent to new subscribers after they sign up, introducing your brand and key offerings.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Subject: Welcome to [Your Company Name] - Your Path to Success!

Dear [Subscriber's First Name],

Welcome to [Your Company Name]! We are thrilled to have you join our community of passionate customers.

In this email, we will introduce you to what makes us unique and share some exciting updates. Over the next few days, you’ll receive more emails from us that will help you get the most out of your experience with [Your Company Name].

Stay tuned!

Best regards,
[Your Full Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]

label: Write a product launch email
use_case: Announce new products or services to existing customers, encouraging them to explore and purchase.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Subject: Introducing [Product Name] - The Latest from [Your Company Name]

Dear [Customer's First Name],

We are excited to announce our latest offering, [Product Name], which we believe will be a game-changer for our customers like you. Here’s what it can do:

[Provide 1-2 sentences about the product benefits.]

Would love your feedback and thoughts on this new addition! If you’re interested in learning more or purchasing [Product Name], please visit our website at [Your Website URL].

Best regards,
[Your Full Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]

label: Craft a post-purchase thank-you email
use_case: Send a thank-you message to customers after they make a purchase, ensuring a positive experience and encouraging future buys.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Subject: Thank You for Your Purchase - We Hope You Love It!

Dear [Customer's First Name],

Thank you so much for choosing [Your Company Name]! I’m thrilled to know that you’ve selected one of our products. We hope it brings you joy and serves its purpose well.

If there are any issues or if you have questions, please don’t hesitate to contact us at [Your Contact Information].

Looking forward to serving you again soon!

Warm regards,
[Your Full Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]

label: Develop a customer feedback email
use_case: Gather customer insights by requesting feedback on their recent purchases, improving future services and products.
prompt:
[BRACKETS] (Paste this into chatgpt.com or claude.ai. Fill in the [BRACKETED] parts with your details first.)

Subject: We Value Your Feedback - Help Us Make Our Service Even Better!

Dear [Customer's First Name],

I hope you are enjoying your time with us at [Your Company Name]. As a valued customer, we would love to hear from you about your recent experience. Your feedback is incredibly important to us and will help us continue to provide the best possible service.

Please take a moment to share your thoughts on this email. We appreciate your support!

Warm regards,
[Your Full Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]
